title: Oscars 2026: Best Production Design Winner Predictions & Polymarket
text: Polymarket provides real-time prediction market odds for the 2026 Oscars Best Production Design category. The current frontrunner is Frankenstein at 91% with Sinners at 7%. The market has $367.2K traded on Oscars 2026: Best Production Design Winner, with prices updating as traders buy and sell shares based on collective knowledge and conviction. Prediction markets like Polymarket have a strong track record of accuracy, especially as events approach their resolution date. The odds reflect crowd-sourced probabilities based on financial conviction from market participants. For the category with nominees Frankenstein, Hamnet, Marty Supreme, One Battle After Another, and Sinners, the prediction market data consistently favored Frankenstein throughout the awards season leading up to the March 15, 2026 ceremony.
